allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'cleaned'")
Bash(awk '/^UPSTASH/ {n=length\($0\); printf "Line %d: total bytes=%d, last char code=%d \(CR=13, LF=10\)\\n", NR, n, substr\($0,n,1\)~/\\r/?13:0}' .env.local)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const t of j.tunnels\){console.log\(t.public_url\)}}catch\(e\){console.log\('ngrok API not ready:',d.slice\(0,200\)\)}}\)")
